description: Curated set of structural alerts with SMARTS patterns and toxicity weights for molecular toxicity prediction.

alerts.description: Nitro aromatic compounds are known mutagens.
Primary aromatic amines are common metabolic activation targets.
Secondary aromatic amines exhibit moderate toxicity risk.
Azides are unstable and potentially toxic.
Isocyanates are reactive and respiratory sensitizers.
Halogenated aliphatic chains may indicate metabolic stability or toxicity.
Azo compounds can be reduced to aromatic amines.
Hydrazine derivatives are toxic and potentially carcinogenic.
